overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a dystopian city street during an orange dust storm. The environment features neon-lit storefronts, digital billboards, and scattered pedestrians amid heavy atmospheric haze with low visibility.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with crosswalk during dust storm

agents.ego_description: character walking steadily along city sidewalk approaching a crosswalk with heavy orange atmospheric haze

notable_agents.action: walking in same direction along the sidewalk

entered.detail: large vertical digital billboard displaying red and white oni demon face with Japanese text
yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing markings on asphalt
tall black traffic signal pole with pedestrian crossing lights
tall modern building with reflective glass facade partially obscured by haze

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an open urban sidewalk during a severe orange dust storm. A massive digital billboard displaying a demon face looms ahead through the haze, while pedestrians and sparse vehicle traffic move through the intersection. The environment features modern glass architecture and traffic infrastructure barely visible through the thick atmospheric conditions.

events.description: moving from open intersection into narrower sidewalk corridor lined with trees

agents.ego_description: continuing along sidewalk passing a food cart vendor and tree planters

notable_agents.action: walking ahead on the sidewalk moving away from camera

entered.detail: mature deciduous tree with dense canopy overhanging the sidewalk
street vendor cart with large black umbrella and illuminated display
black metal security fence running along the sidewalk edge
short black posts with yellow stripes marking the sidewalk boundary

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a narrower, tree-lined sidewalk section. The character passes a food cart with a black umbrella on the left while walking alongside a metal fence. The dense tree canopy blocks much of the hazy sky above, creating a darker, more enclosed atmosphere compared to the open intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial walkway with digital ceiling advertisements

events.description: entering covered pedestrian arcade with overhead digital billboards
ambient lighting shifts from orange haze to artificial neon glow from ceiling displays

agents.ego_description: walking through covered commercial corridor observing neon storefronts and digital ceiling ads

notable_agents.action: walking toward camera through the covered walkway

entered.detail: overhead structure with illuminated digital screens displaying advertisements
bright cyan neon sign reading CHILLAX on building facade
red neon open sign in storefront window
large digital billboard on ceiling displaying animated advertisements
yellow and black sign reading PAWN SHOP above entrance

segments.scene_description: The character enters a covered commercial walkway sheltered from the dust storm. The environment transforms into a neon-lit corridor with digital advertisements covering the ceiling. Bright neon signs for businesses like CHILLAX and a pawn shop illuminate the wet reflective pavement, creating a stark contrast to the orange haze outside.

events.description: exiting covered arcade back into open street with orange dust storm visibility

agents.ego_description: continuing along sidewalk passing pedestrians and storefronts in the open hazy environment

notable_agents.action: standing with arms crossed near building entrance

entered.detail: deciduous tree with sparse leaves along the sidewalk edge
row of parked cars along the street curb
building facade with multiple neon signs and illuminated windows
tall vertical digital advertisement screen on building side

segments.scene_description: The character exits the covered walkway back into the open street where the orange dust storm continues. The sidewalk runs alongside parked vehicles and commercial buildings with neon storefronts. Pedestrians walk through the hazy atmosphere as the character continues down the street past various illuminated signs and urban infrastructure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dystopian city street that shifts from an open, dust-choked intersection into a sheltered neon corridor before returning to the hazy urban exterior. It begins on an open sidewalk during a severe orange dust storm, moving toward a massive digital billboard of a demon face that looms through the thick atmospheric haze. As the character progresses, the scene narrows into a tree-lined section where a dense canopy and a metal fence create a more enclosed, darker atmosphere. The environment then transforms as the camera enters a covered commercial walkway, replacing the orange glow with bright neon signs and digital ceiling advertisements that reflect off wet pavement. Finally, the shot exits the shelter and emerges back into the open street, passing parked vehicles and illuminated storefronts as the orange dust storm continues to envelop the city.
